question_prompt: Q10: Have you ever posted or considered posting about work struggles on social media?
panels: Q10: Have you ever posted or considered posting about work struggles on social media?
answers: No, I keep my work struggles private
No, but I have thought about it
Yes, I have shared my work frustration online anonymously
Yes, I have shared my work frustrations online on a private account (only those following you can see the post)
Yes, I have shared my work frustration online on a public account (anyone can see the post)
